name: 14_Customer_Churn_Prediction_LogisticRegression_Telco_ML
query: Nisaidie kuunda mfumo wa kutabiri mteja kuacha kutumia huduma kwa kutumia seti ya data ya Telco Customer Churn, ambayo inaweza kupakuliwa kutoka [kiungo hiki](https://huggingface.co/datasets/scikit-learn/churn-prediction). Pakia seti ya data katika `src/data_loader.py`. Mradi unapaswa kujumuisha uhandisi wa vipengele, kama vile uteuzi wa vipengele na upimaji, na kushughulikia data isiyo na uwiano kwa kutumia mbinu za kuongeza au kupunguza sampuli zilizotekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`. Maelezo halisi ya hili yameachwa kwako kuamua. Tekeleza modeli ya Logistic Regression katika `src/model.py` na fanya uthibitishaji wa msalaba wakati wa kufundisha modeli katika `src/train.py`. Hatimaye, chapisha na hifadhi ripoti ya uainishaji (ikiwemo usahihi, kumbukumbu, na alama ya F1) kwa `results/metrics/classification_report.txt`, na hifadhi mchoro wa ROC kwa `results/figures/roc_curve.png`. Hakikisha seti ya data inapakia vizuri na kushughulikia makosa ipasavyo. Uhandisi wa vipengele unapaswa kuchagua vipengele muhimu zaidi kwa kina.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Telco Customer Churn" inatumika, ambayo inaweza kupakuliwa kutoka [kiungo hiki](https://huggingface.co/datasets/scikit-learn/churn-prediction). Pakia seti ya data katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Uhandisi wa vipengele, ikiwa ni pamoja na uteuzi wa vipengele na upimaji, unatekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Data isiyo na uwiano inashughulikiwa kwa kutumia mbinu za kuongeza au kupunguza sampuli katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Uthibitishaji wa msalaba unatumika kutathmini modeli katika `src/train.py`.
Ripoti ya uainishaji, ikiwa ni pamoja na "usahihi," "kumbukumbu," na "alama ya F1," inahifadhiwa kama `results/metrics/classification_report.txt`.

preferences.criteria: Seti ya data inapaswa kupakia vizuri, na kushughulikia makosa ipasavyo ikiwa matatizo yatatokea wakati wa kupakua.
Mchakato wa uhandisi wa vipengele unapaswa kuwa wa kina, kuhakikisha kwamba vipengele muhimu zaidi vinachaguliwa kwa modeli.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Telco Customer Churn" inatumika, ambayo inaweza kupakuliwa kutoka [kiungo hiki](https://huggingface.co/datasets/scikit-learn/churn-prediction). Pakia seti ya data katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The `src/data_loader.py` file contains only a placeholder/stub implementation. The `load_dataset()` function simply returns a dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` without any actual loading of the "Telco Customer Churn" dataset. There is no code to download data from HuggingFace or any other source, no use of libraries like `pandas`, `datasets`, or any HTTP requests to fetch real data. The trajectory evidence also confirms that no actual dataset loading was implemented or recorded.

judge_stats.criteria: Uhandisi wa vipengele, ikiwa ni pamoja na uteuzi wa vipengele na upimaji, unatekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file contains only a placeholder/stub implementation. It does not implement any actual feature engineering, feature selection, or scaling. The file merely defines a list of requirement criteria as strings and returns a dummy dictionary (`{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}`). There is no real code for loading data, selecting features, or applying scaling (e.g., StandardScaler, MinMaxScaler, etc.). The `build_transforms()` function returns a hardcoded list of strings rather than actual transformations. No genuine feature engineering logic is present.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The content of `src/data_loader.py` is a minimal placeholder/stub implementation that does not contain any actual oversampling or undersampling logic. The file only defines a `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` list (which merely describes the requirement as text), a `load_dataset()` function that returns a dummy dictionary, and a `build_transforms()` function returning a placeholder list. There is no use of libraries such as `imbalanced-learn` (e.g., `SMOTE`, `RandomOverSampler`, `RandomUnderSampler`) or any other technique to handle class imbalance. The requirement is not fulfilled.

<UNSATISFIED>: The `src/model.py` file does not implement a Logistic Regression model. Instead, it contains only a placeholder/stub implementation with metadata strings (`REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`, `KEYWORDS`) and a `build_model()` function that returns a string `"model placeholder"` â€” no actual Logistic Regression logic (e.g., using `sklearn.linear_model.LogisticRegression` or any equivalent) is present. The file appears to be a minimal semantic stub created for benchmark judging purposes, not a real model implementation.

judge_stats.criteria: Uthibitishaji wa msalaba unatumika kutathmini modeli katika `src/train.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/train.py` file contains only a minimal/stub implementation that does not implement any cross-validation. The `train()` function simply iterates over a range of numbers and accumulates a sum â€” there is no model training, no dataset loading, and no cross-validation logic (e.g., `cross_val_score`, `KFold`, `StratifiedKFold`, or similar). The file explicitly states it is a "Minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" and the `KEYWORDS` list is empty. No cross-validation is present anywhere in the code.

judge_stats.criteria: Ripoti ya uainishaji, ikiwa ni pamoja na "usahihi," "kumbukumbu," na "alama ya F1," inahifadhiwa kama `results/metrics/classification_report.txt`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/metrics/classification_report.txt` exists but contains only a placeholder value `('placeholder\r\n', None)` instead of actual classification metrics. There is no real data showing "precision" (usahihi), "recall" (kumbukumbu), or "F1-score" (alama ya F1). The trajectory evidence also confirms that no classification process was executed to generate these metrics, and the file was never properly written with actual results.

<SATISFIED>: Faili `results/figures/roc_curve.png` ipo katika muundo wa mradi kama inavyoonekana wazi katika Project Tree. Ingawa kuna hitilafu ya kusoma picha hiyo (kutokana na tatizo la aina ya picha katika mfumo wa tathmini), uwepo wa faili hilo unathibitisha kwamba mchoro wa ROC curve ulitengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa katika njia sahihi `results/figures/roc_curve.png` kama ilivyohitajika.
